center.summary: 齊馬南佩楚察國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Madagascar plover，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.evidence: The Madagascar plover (Anarhynchus thoracicus), also known as the black-banded plover, is a small (37 g) monogamous shorebird in the family Charadriidae, native to western Madagascar
